title: Improvement notice issued to Reading Borough Council: July 2025
body: "This improvement notice requires Reading Borough Council to take steps to improve its children’s social care services.  It follows Ofsted’s joint targeted area inspection (JTAI) report, published on 6 May 2025, which identified significant weaknesses in the multi-agency approach to prevention, help and support for children who are victims of domestic abuse.  One area of priority action and several areas of improvement were identified.  "
